label: Fixed
items: Harvest tasks created via Save-to-Shed and Companion Plants — anything stored as the legacy task type "Harvest" rather than "Harvesting" — now get the full window-task experience: green calendar tint, in-window task modal with Harvested / Picked some / Not yet / Check with AI actions, and the click-any-day-in-window panel.

A one-time backfill ran across every legacy "Harvest" task in the database to set window_end_date from the parent blueprint and collapse the per-day duplicates the same way the original Wave 20 backfill handled "Harvesting" tasks. Existing summer / autumn harvest pile-ups should be cleaner now.
Calendar dot colours treat both "Harvest" and "Harvesting" the same amber, so the legacy type no longer renders as the default fallback colour.
